name: COMTECH TELECOMMUNICATIONS CORP /DE/
summary: PART I Founded in 1967, we have a longstanding history of providing critical communications technology and solutions to customers around the world. We serve two core end-markets: secure satellite and wireless communications via our Satellite and Space Communications segment and public safety via our Allerium (formerly, our Terrestrial and Wireless Networks) segment.
